subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath been adorned with the lights of the Most Great Countenance. God willing, mayest thou be the recipient, in all conditions, of the favors of the Beloved of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت بانوار منظر اکبر مزین شد انشاء الله در کل احوال بعنایات محبوب عالمیان فائز
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity
